visualization.requirement: Replace parallel coordinate plot with faceted bar charts showing district-level nutrient profiles alongside yield metrics
visualization.reason: Parallel coordinates are not native to Vega-Lite and would create implementation challenges. Faceted bars maintain multidimensional comparison while staying within supported visualization types

interaction.requirement: Hover tooltips showing detailed data points in scatter plots and heatmap cells instead of non-existent map elements
interaction.reason: Original reference to map elements was inconsistent with proposed visualizations
